title: The Lalit Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: The Lalit Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, The Lalit Hotels in Amritsar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About The Lalit Hotels:
The Lalit Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Lalit Hotels!
